title: cymbidium × holfordianum
intro: Cymbidium × holfordianum, also known as the Holford's Cymbidium, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium kanterianum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it effective against various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Cymbidium × holfordianum is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
